Description: Full table scan due to SELECT * usage
    Query: SELECT * FROM large_table
    Context: Large dataset with millions of rows and no WHERE clause
    Root Cause: Full table scan caused by missing filtering conditions
    Suggestion: Add WHERE clause and create indexes on frequently filtered columns

Description: JSON filtering without index causes slow performance
    Query: SELECT * FROM policy_data WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.policy.state') = 'CA'
    Context: Large dataset and JSON field not indexed
    Root Cause: No index on JSON field
    Suggestion: Create functional index on JSON field or extract JSON field into column

Description: Complex join between multiple large tables
    Query: SELECT * FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN payments p ON p.order_id = o.id
    Context: Multiple joins without proper indexing
    Root Cause: Missing indexes on join keys
    Suggestion: Add indexes on join columns such as customer_id and order_id

Description: High-frequency query executed thousands of times
    Query: SELECT * FROM config_table WHERE key = ?
    Context: Query executed very frequently
    Root Cause: Repeated execution without caching
    Suggestion: Implement caching for frequently accessed configuration data

Description: Nested subquery slowing performance
    Query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT id FROM customers WHERE state = 'CA')
    Context: Subquery executed repeatedly
    Root Cause: Nested subquery inefficiency
    Suggestion: Replace subquery with JOIN

Description: Filtering column without index
    Query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_date = '2024-01-01'
    Context: Filtering column not indexed
    Root Cause: Missing index on order_date
    Suggestion: Add index on order_date column

Description: Aggregation across multiple tables
    Query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
    Context: Aggregation across large tables
    Root Cause: Join cost and table size
    Suggestion: Use indexed columns and pre-aggregated tables

Description: Querying large logging table
    Query: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE timestamp > '2024-01-01'
    Context: Logs table extremely large
    Root Cause: Large table scanning
    Suggestion: Partition logs table by date

Description: Slow update query
    Query: UPDATE orders SET status = 'shipped' WHERE order_id = 123
    Context: Large number of update operations
    Root Cause: Lock contention
    Suggestion: Optimize indexing and reduce locking scope

Description: Sudden spike in latency
    Query: SELECT * FROM transaction_table
    Context: Previous latency was 1 second
    Root Cause: Unexpected workload spike
    Suggestion: Investigate system load and add monitoring alerts

Description: Sorting large dataset
    Query: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY created_date
    Context: Sorting without index
    Root Cause: No index on sorting column
    Suggestion: Add index on created_date

Description: Wildcard LIKE query
    Query: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%john%'
    Context: Wildcard search prevents index usage
    Root Cause: Leading wildcard disables index
    Suggestion: Use full-text search index

Description: Multiple redundant indexes
    Query: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE customer_id = 101
    Context: Multiple overlapping indexes
    Root Cause: Index overhead
    Suggestion: Remove redundant indexes

Description: Large result set transfer
    Query: SELECT * FROM transactions
    Context: Huge number of rows returned
    Root Cause: Excessive data transfer
    Suggestion: Limit returned rows using pagination

Description: Memory pressure affecting performance
    Query: SELECT * FROM large_memory_table
    Context: System running low on memory
    Root Cause: Memory bottleneck
    Suggestion: Increase memory or optimize query memory usage
